历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 12551 → 17052 → 19023 → 18694 → 21842, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9291 from 2021 to 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 21842, a significant backward shift of about 3148 compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 8 in 2021, 14 in 2022, and 13 from 2023 to 2025, with the 2026 plan still at 13, remaining unchanged for four consecutive years, creating no additional competitive pressure from the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its main ranking in the 2026 Soft Science ranking is about 79th, stable in the 75–80 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management incidents, with no major negative public opinion; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 70th, with an average evaluation, indicating moderate to low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signs of rising application interest; Psychology is A+ (top nationally), Marxist Theory is A, Physical Education is A-, Education is A-, showing strong teacher-training disciplines; among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Chemistry (Teacher Training) corresponds to a chemistry discipline without an independent rating, but the overall strength of teacher-training disciplines provides stable support for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of majors such as Chemistry, Materials, and Environment in 2024 was respectively differentiated/wait-and-see, general/wait-and-see, and differentiated/wait-and-see, overall on the cooler side; the total number of Gaokao examinees in this province in 2026 is about 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category examinees of about 137,000 based on recent proportions, a slight decrease from the 139,000 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is a cross-provincial enrollment, with no local enrollment preference in Chongqing; the university's local enrollment proportion in Guangdong is much higher than in other provinces, placing Chongqing examinees in the out-of-province competition sequence, with no regional preference advantage. Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees in the province, and the stable reputation and popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) based on the 2025 baseline of 21842, but the overall backward trend has not fundamentally reversed; the predicted minimum ranking is about 21792, with a range of 21292–22292.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1873 → 3221 → 4014 → 3880 → 3581, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, the cumulative backward shift was about 2141 places. In 2024, there was a slight recovery, and in 2025, it continued to move forward to 3581, with a slight narrowing trend in the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3581. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category was 7 students in 2021, and 12 students from 2022 to 2025. The 2026 plan remains 12 students, unchanged for five consecutive years, indicating no additional competitive pressure from the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 79th, with recent rankings stable in the 75–80 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management incidents, with no major negative public opinion. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 70th, with an evaluation of average. Short video platform exposure is at a medium-low level, with no obvious signs of increased application interest. Psychology is A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory is A, Physical Education is A-, and Education is A-. The strength of normal (teacher education) disciplines provides stable appeal to candidates aspiring to the education industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors in 2024 is characterized by differentiation and wait-and-see, overall stable. The total number of Gaokao examinees in this province in 2026 is about 209,000. Based on recent proportions, it is estimated that History Category examinees number about 72,000, a slight decrease from 73,000 in 2025, leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure. In 2026, South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is an inter-provincial enrollment, with no local enrollment preference in Chongqing. The university's local enrollment proportion in Guangdong is much higher than in other provinces. Chongqing candidates are in the inter-provincial competition sequence, with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight narrowing trend of historical rankings in the past three years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in the total number of History Category examinees in the province, and the stable reputation and popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) based on the 2025 baseline of 3581. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3551, with a range of 3051–4051.
